topic: Configure public IP addresses (Basic vs Standard SKU)
key_facts: Zone redundant IPs can only be created in regions where 3 availability zones are live.

Static public IP addresses are commonly used in the following scenarios:

 
 When you must update firewall rules to communicate with your Azure resources.
Standard v2 SKU Public IPs are always created as zone-redundant in regions that support availability zones .
Standard SKU Public IPs can be created as zonal or zone-redundant in regions that support availability zones .
Contact support to increase above the default limits based on your business needs.

SKU

 
 Important

 On September 30, 2025, Basic SKU public IPs were retired.
The SKU determines their functionality including allocation method, feature support, and resources they can be associated with.
